contract: Plugins do the craft; the brain records the knowledge. Every plugin output that is a decision, a finding, or a durable artifact gets filed into this project's .brain/ by the brain's skills and hooks — so the capability is transient but its knowledge compounds.

install.how: Claude Code plugins install with /plugin. Add the source marketplace once, then install the plugin: `/plugin marketplace add <source>` then `/plugin install <name>@<marketplace>`. The official plugins are browsable at https://claude.com/plugins. /brain:init offers this set but never installs silently — it confirms the exact current command with the curator, because marketplace names and sources evolve.
install.scope: Install these at user scope so they are present in every project; the per-project .brain/ decides which knowledge each produces gets filed.

plugins.name: github
plugins.brain_integration: Reviews and PR links are filed to the wiki; /brain:wrap posts status back to the PR.

plugins.name: frontend-design
plugins.brain_integration: Design decisions are distilled to decisions/ as ADRs; audit scores land in the workstream's project-status page. Executes the build that ui-ux-pro-max's design system decides.
plugins.precedence: ui-ux-pro-max decides the design system; frontend-design executes the build (domain pack > craft plugin).

plugins.name: superpowers
plugins.brain_integration: Provides the TDD methodology behind /brain:build; root-cause findings from debugging are filed as wiki pages and repeated corrections seed instincts/pending/.

plugins.name: security-guidance
plugins.brain_integration: Findings are filed as wiki pages; open P0 findings gate /brain:wrap exactly like a MewVault-style audit gate.

plugins.name: product-tracking-skills
plugins.brain_integration: Tracking plans live in projects/ alongside the workstream they measure.

plugins.name: code-modernization
plugins.brain_integration: Migration notes and before/after analysis are filed to wiki/research/ so the rationale survives the refactor.

plugins.name: productivity
plugins.brain_integration: Feeds the standup brief from the brain's active projects, recent log, and open specs.

plugins.name: product-management
plugins.brain_integration: PRDs land in raw-sources/ and are ingested into the wiki so requirements become searchable, cross-linked knowledge.

plugins.name: ui-ux-pro-max
plugins.brain_integration: Decides the design system (palette / style / type / industry reasoning); frontend-design executes the build. Choices are filed as decisions/ ADRs; its anti-patterns seed instincts/. Architecturally a mini Monkey Brain — validates the domain-pack format the engine generalizes in the product-design pack.
plugins.precedence: Decides the design system that frontend-design then builds.
